chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-657 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 20-05-2025 Mr. Muhammad Uzair Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. **** Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that petitioner will avail alternate remedy by approaching the proper forum for redressal of his grievance. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
